top_signals.title: ‘Follow the gigawatts’: Bernstein sees upside in several bitcoin miners amid $90 billion in AI data center deals
top_signals.summary: Bernstein sees bitcoin miners benefiting from $90B in AI deals, with Outperform ratings on IREN, Riot, CleanSpark, and Core Scientific.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
